name: the-almanacker
description: Drive NotebookLM-only web UI features through agent-browser and an authenticated CDP profile.

interface.shortDescription: NotebookLM web UI automation through agent-browser
interface.longDescription: Uses agent-browser with a dedicated authenticated Chrome CDP profile to reach NotebookLM features exposed only in the web UI.
defaultPrompt: Show me how to use The Almanacker.
Send this task to the NotebookLM web UI.
Set up the shared agent-browser profile.
